# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-serviceentry
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-virtualservice
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 80
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.example.com

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-db-serviceentry
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgresql
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-db-virtualservice
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.example.com
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: db.example.com
